data.body: 21dd plan-review now PASSES (fresh @5a39f85eb, 0 blocking, 17 advisory) after remediation. 36c7 ran to completion: BLOCK on 2 findings - (1) docs AC needs proving command, (2) TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR tombstone must live in tracker_dir_override() not just load_config() (inbound_translate._resolve_tracker_dir bypasses load_config). Remediated both in 36c7 desc, re-review launched in background. Proceeding to CLAIM + execute 21dd now.
